creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
after installing apache-modssl port, the /usr/local/etc/rc.d/apache.sh script
installed doesn't have a 'stop' action.  in the port's files directory is an
appropriate apache.sh that should be installed instead, with one change to make
it call apachectl with 'startssl' instead of just 'start'.

Fix: 

copy the apache.sh script from the files directory on top of the installed one.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
install the port.
